title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Medical Officer with drive and ambition, Aster DM Healthcare Capital India in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
